description: 69 - 11-02-2025 - Email from Peter Mandelson to Morgan McSweeney (former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10)

participants.name: Email from Peter Mandelson to Morgan McSweeney
participants.role: former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister

text:
of Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10)

From: Peter Mandelson
To: Morgan McSweeney
Date: 11/02/25

Dinner with Mark Burnett

Ahead of Mark’s visit I thought I would give you some impressions following my dinner
with him last night.

Mark. Third Party > and I had a (verv) conviyial dinner together.

Peter

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

205
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
